decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to use a combination of cards like Phyrexian Dreadnought, Stifle, and Vision Charm to quickly assemble and protect the Stiflenought combo. By utilizing counter spells and card draw to control the game, the deck aims to quickly drop the Phyrexian Dreadnought onto the battlefield, then counter any attempts to remove it. The inclusion of cards like Peek and Portent help to dig for the combo pieces, while cards like Misdirection and Thwart provide added protection. The ultimate goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful and hard-to-stop combo.

This deck focuses on generating card advantage and mana ramp through enchantments, using cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Mirri's Guile. The key strategy is to control the board with cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing, while setting up for a game-winning combo with Opalescence and Replenish. Solitary Confinement provides protection while Serra's Sanctum maximizes mana production. Sterling Grove offers versatility and protection. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through the synergy of enchantments and combo potential.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Hypnotic Specter, and Withered Wretch, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The inclusion of versatile threats like Graveborn Muse and Nantuko Shade, along with removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict, provide the deck with flexibility and ways to maintain an aggressive strategy while controlling the board. The mana base includes Mishra's Factory and Wasteland for additional creature threats and disruption capabilities.

The focus of this deck is to use the combo of Opalescence and Parallax Wave to exile all of your opponent's creatures while also generating value from your enchantments and triggering powerful effects from cards like Decree of Silence. The deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up for a game-winning Replenish to bring back all of your enchantments from the graveyard. This deck is designed to outvalue and outmaneuver your opponent through careful control of the battlefield and efficient use of your enchantment-based resources.

This aggressive Goblin deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of fast and efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly access powerful creatures like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Piledriver, the deck can present a lethal threat early in the game. Support cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional removal and reach, while cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, this deck focuses on speed, aggression, and synergy among its Goblin creatures to secure a victory.

The deck is focused on fast and aggressive play with the Goblin tribe, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to bring out powerful creatures like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader quickly. It also includes disruptive elements like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to control the opponent's resources. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of goblins and finish them off with cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander. The inclusion of Goblin King provides additional synergy and buffs for the goblin creatures.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly and aggressively overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruption spells. By playing a combination of powerful creatures like Nantuko Shade, Hypnotic Specter, and Graveborn Muse, along with disruptive spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, the deck aims to control the game and pressure the opponent's life total. Additionally, cards like Mishra's Factory and Wasteland help to disrupt the opponent's mana base and further solidify the deck's aggressive game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly getting Attunement and Opalescence on the field, while utilizing Parallax Wave to control the opponent's creatures. By utilizing Replenish to bring back key enchantments from the graveyard, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence and lock down their plays with Decree of Silence. The combination of card draw with Intuition and control spells like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares helps to maintain the deck's strategy while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Buried Alive and Putrid Imp, then bring them back to the battlefield with Reanimate and Exhume. Cabal Therapy and Unmask help disrupt the opponent's hand, while Dark Ritual accelerates mana production. The deck focuses on creating an overwhelming board presence with cards like Verdant Force, Akroma, Angel of Wrath, Multani, Maro-Sorcerer, Phantom Nishoba, and Symbiotic Wurm, overwhelming the opponent before they have a chance to respond.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly ramp up mana production through enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, while drawing cards and gaining incremental value from enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. The deck also aims to establish a lock on the board using cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, while managing resources with tools like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing. The goal is to set up a powerful endgame win condition with cards like Replenish, utilizing the synergy between enchantments to overwhelm the opponent.

This Goblin aggro deck focuses on flooding the board with low-cost creatures like Goblin Lackey and Mogg Fanatic, supported by cards like Goblin Warchief to reduce costs and Goblin Matron to tutor for key cards. Rishadan Port and Wasteland disrupt opponent's mana base while Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Piledriver provide finishing power. The deck also includes removal with Gempalm Incinerator and Naturalize for flexibility. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a swarm of Goblins, leveraging tribal synergies and resource denial.

The deck focuses on playing low-cost, aggressive black creatures and disrupting the opponent with targeted discard spells and removal. It aims to quickly deplete the opponent's hand and board by applying steady pressure and making efficient trades while controlling the game with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The inclusion of Mishra's Factory and Nantuko Shade provide additional threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck relies on a combination of creature beats and disruption to outpace the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on assembling the powerful combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a nearly unbeatable threat on the battlefield. By countering opponents' spells and controlling the board with counterspells and other disruptive cards, the deck aims to protect the combo and secure victory through overwhelming force. The inclusion of card draw and selection spells provides consistency and helps find the necessary pieces to execute the combo efficiently. With the right mix of control and combo potential, this deck aims to dominate the game with its powerful synergy.

This deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy using cheap and efficient creatures like Nantuko Shade and Hypnotic Specter to pressure the opponent. It also includes disruptive spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck utilizes cards like Mishra's Factory and Wasteland to control the opponent's mana base and keep them off balance. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of creatures, disruption, and mana denial to secure a victory in a short amount of time.

The deck focuses on quickly and efficiently assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo, using cards like Stifle, Vision Charm, and Opt to manipulate draws and protect the combo. Misdirection and Counterspell offer disruption against opponents, while Gush and Impulse provide card advantage. The inclusion of Thwart and Foil acts as additional counterspells, ensuring the combo goes off smoothly. Powder Keg and Tsabo's Web help control the board and slow down the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to secure victory through the powerful synergy of the Stiflenought combo.

The main focus of the deck is to control the game with powerful counterspells and disrupt the opponent's strategies with cards like Stifle and Foil. The combo involves playing Phyrexian Dreadnought and using Stifle to counter its triggered ability, allowing for a powerful 12/12 creature for just one mana. The deck also includes card draw and manipulation to find key pieces quickly. The overall strategy is to protect the combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure victory.
